description: Letter from Fadl b. Amrūṣ to Nahray b. Nissim. On verso a note by the reciever, in Arabic script, documenting the arrival of the letter on 10th of Ramaḍān. Another letter, unconnected to the other one, is bound at the same number. This is a letter from a woman, Umm Nissim, to her relative, the paternal nephew of her husband (because she signs "marrat 'Amihi") Abu Sa'd b. X al-Barqi.
